description: Generate wrapper APIs that work across all Serilog versions (v2.x, v3.x, v4.x) by targeting only the shared stable surface.

mappings.description: Static Log.Information — stable across all versions
mappings.notes: Core logging methods unchanged since v2.0.

mappings.description: Static Log.Warning — stable across all versions
Static Log.Error — stable across all versions
Static Log.Fatal — stable across all versions
Static Log.Debug — stable across all versions
Static Log.Verbose — stable across all versions
LoggerConfiguration fluent chain — stable across all versions
mappings.notes: Core fluent configuration API unchanged across versions.

mappings.description: ILogger.ForContext with property — stable across all versions

mappings.notes: Synchronous variant available in all versions.
Behavior changed in v4 (case-insensitive matching) but the API shape is the same.

unsupportedTransformations.description: Log.CloseAndFlushAsync — v3+ only, no v2 equivalent
unsupportedTransformations.reason: ValueTask-based async flush introduced in v3.0.0. Not available in v2.x.
unsupportedTransformations.workaround: Use Log.CloseAndFlush() synchronously, or conditionally call async variant via reflection.

unsupportedTransformations.reason: First-class OpenTelemetry trace correlation added in v3.1.0.
unsupportedTransformations.workaround: Use LogEvent.Properties to manually attach trace IDs in v2.x.

unsupportedTransformations.reason: Batching sink interface introduced in v3.0.0 with Serilog.Sinks.PeriodicBatching integration.
unsupportedTransformations.workaround: Use PeriodicBatchingSink NuGet package directly in v2.x.
Implement ILogEventEnricher with condition logic in Enrich method.
Use PeriodicBatchingSink constructor parameters in v2/v3.
